footnotes.text: Our Lord's relatives did not yet believe in Him (cf. John 7, 5). The Blessed Virgin was with them on this occasion, but she had no misconception of His nature and mission.

Brethren: relatives of Jesus, not blood brothers. This wider use of the term was common among the Jews. Jesus does not disclaim the bonds of physical relationship, but He seizes the opportunity to give a lesson on the greater dignity of spiritual relationship.
